test_cases.name: high_signal_reddit
test_cases.text: I'm a property manager for 200 units. Every single morning I wake up to 40 emails asking where to send rent, or complaining about parking. I spend at least 2 hours daily just copy-pasting the same replies. It's driving me insane. I'd easily pay $100/mo if software just handled this.

test_cases.name: maintenance_frustration
test_cases.text: As a maintenance dispatcher, I hate how tenants report issues. They send me SMS, WhatsApp, and emails. I lose track of broken pipes constantly. I spend my whole week trying to consolidate tickets.
test_cases.expected_problem: consolidating maintenance tickets from multiple channels
